# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - "**"
  pull_request:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [20]
        python-version: ["3.11"]

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}

      - name: Cache node_modules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            **/node_modules
            .npm
            .yarn/cache
            .pnpm-store
            .next/cache
            dist
            build
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ matrix.node-version }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml', '**/package.json', '.nvmrc', '.node-version', '.npmrc', '.yarnrc', '.yarnrc.yml', '.pnpmfile.cjs', '.npm/**', '.yarn/**', '.config/**', 'config/**', '.env', '.env.*') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ matrix.node-version }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-

      - name: Cache pip packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            .venv
            venv
            __pycache__
            .pytest_cache
            .mypy_cache
            .ruff_cache
            build
            dist
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-py-${{ matrix.python-version }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt', '**/pyproject.toml', '**/poetry.lock', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/setup.py', '**/setup.cfg', '.python-version', '.pip/pip.conf', 'pip.conf', '.config/pip/**', '.config/**', 'config/**', '.env', '.env.*') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-py-${{ matrix.python-version }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-py-

      - name: Cache environment and tool configs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .env
            .env.*
            .npmrc
            .yarnrc
            .yarnrc.yml
            .pnpmfile.cjs
            .pypirc
            .python-version
            .nvmrc
            .node-version
            .tool-versions
            .config
            config
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-configs-${{ hashFiles('.env', '.env.*', '.npmrc', '.yarnrc', '.yarnrc.yml', '.pnpmfile.cjs', '.pypirc', '.python-version', '.nvmrc', '.node-version', '.tool-versions', '.config/**', 'config/**') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-configs-

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        if: ${{ hashFiles('**/package.json') != '' }}
        run: |
          if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then
            npm ci --prefer-offline
          elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then
            corepack enable
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile
          elif [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then
            corepack enable
            pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
          else
            npm install --prefer-offline
          fi

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        if: ${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt', '**/pyproject.toml', '**/Pipfile', '**/setup.py') != '' }}
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
            pip install -r requirements.txt
          fi
          if [ -f requirements-dev.txt ]; then
            pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
          fi
          if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then
            pip install .
          elif [ -f setup.py ]; then
            pip install .
          fi

      - name: Build
        run: |
          if [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm run build --if-present
          fi
          if [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f setup.py ]; then
            python setup.py build || true
          fi

      - name: Test
        run: |
          if [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm test --if-present
          fi
          if [ -d tests ] || [ -f pytest.ini ] || [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then
            pytest -q || true
          fi
